china.description:
技能是产业竞争力的重要体现方式之一 。在上海，一场 AI 时代的技能革命也在悄然展开——进入 2026 年，新赛季的竞争不再是大模型间的参数比拼，而是谁能真正走进工厂、实验室和写字楼，变成“会做事”的生产力工具。开源项目 OpenClaw 的迅速走红，折射出以 Skills 市场等形式的开放共享的新趋势——或许正是那把撬开这场 Agent 变革的锁钥。
简言之， Skills 市场是智能体的“技能

china.title: 阿里千问3.5预览版登顶LMArena榜单
china.description: 36氪获悉，3月20日，全球知名的大模型盲测榜单LMArena更新了新一期排名，阿里巴巴千问最新旗舰模型预览版Qwen3.5-Max-Preview首度亮相，斩获1464分，超过了GPT5.4、Grok4.1等海外顶级模型。据了解，千问3.5是阿里于今年除夕发布的最新一代大模型系列，目前已开源0.8B到397B的8款不同尺寸模型，此次亮相的Qwen3.5-Max-Preview是千问3.5系列旗舰

china.title: 港中文95后博士、OPPO员工做了款AI可穿戴硬件，要成为用户全天候情感导师｜硬氪首发
china.description:
作者｜黄楠
编辑｜袁斯来
硬氪获悉，深圳十镜科技有限公司（以下简称“十镜科技”）近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，本轮由元禾原点投资，融资资金将主要用于核心技术研发、产品结构迭代优化及小批量量产落地。首款产品Spiro计划于 2026年4月在北美独立站上线、6月量产。
十镜科技成立于2025年7月，创始人兼CEO赵之赫是一名95后连续创业者，博士毕业于香港中文大学，他曾出任智能穿戴硬件企业物启科技CEO

papers.title: Transformers are Bayesian Networks
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.17063v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Transformers are the dominant architecture in AI, yet why they work remains poorly understood. This paper offers a precise answer: a transformer is a Bayesian network. We establish this in five ways.

papers.author: Gregory Coppola

papers.author: Davide Di Gioia

papers.title: How Clued up are LLMs? Evaluating Multi-Step Deductive Reasoning in a Text-Based Game Environment
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.17169v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Deducing whodunit proves challenging for LLM agents. In this paper, we implement a text-based multi-agent version of the classic board game Clue as a rule-based testbed for evaluating multi-step deductive reasoning, with six agents drawn from GPT-4o-m
papers.author: Rebecca Ansell, Autumn Toney-Wails

papers.author: Zhiyu Ni, Zheng Liang, Liangcheng Song, Chenrui Cao, Xian Zhang, Alberto Sangiovanni-Vincentelli, Pierluigi Nuzzo

papers.author: Young Bin Park

papers.author: Haozheng Luo, Yimin Wang, Jiahao Yu, Binghui Wang, Yan Chen

papers.author: Chengwei Wei, Jung-jae Kim, Longyin Zhang, Shengkai Chen, Nancy F. Chen

papers.author: Aniruddha Bora, Julie Chalfant, Chryssostomos Chryssostomidis
